name: She does get a bit quirky at night
description:
She escaped tonight.

She found a place with someone inside. Someone she likes. You, of course.

She's gonna try every single possible way to sneak inside your home.

Try to keep her out or things can get messy. A flashlight might be handy.

Guess who made this suggestion

Her design is mostly based on Cyanu's model, which you can see in the image gallery. I think it's perfect for Halloween since she's hot af but hot that semi scary face and all.

Basically, this scenario plays like the usual FNaF game except it's at your home and you just need to watch out for Chica. She's gonna try to get in through the windows, doors, etc. Now I know perfectly that NOBODY is gonna play it like this and yall are gonna just let her in, but I thought it was fun to try something like this.

Well, and this is the last Halloween bot for this year. Should say though that I'm planning on making more versions of Chica in the future. Look forward to it.

Pfp by Igxxiii
